chapter_title.en: Chapter 59 – Meats of the sacrificial camels and the strutting (racing) camels

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/132)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/132)
text: كَتَبْتُ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) أَسْأَلُهُ عَنْ لُحُومِ الْبُخْتِ وَ أَلْبَانِهِنَّ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Dawood Al Raqqy who said,
‘I wrote to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> asking him<sup>asws</sup> about the meats of the strutting (racing) camels and their milks, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with it’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Dawud al-Riqqiy who has said the following: “I once wrote to abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and ask about the meat of camels of Khurasan and their milk. He (the Imam) said, ’It is not unlawful.”’
